== Notes for [[Item:Q78005|Q78005]] ==

(Aerobindus son of) Flavius Dagalaiphus (ca 430 - aft. 461), Roman Consul in 461, and wife Godisthea (b. ca 445).

See / Lásd:

http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Flavius_Areobindus_Dagalaiphus

•ID: I5426Da83a

•Name: Dagalaifus -

•Given Name: Dagalaifus

•Surname: -

•Sex: M

•Note:

SOURCES:

- eMahlerL98My0

-

PKD UAD-5426Da83a 2003My22

Copyright (c) 2009 Paul K Davis [paulkdavis@@earthlink.net] Fremont CA

Father: Areobindus -

Marriage 1 Godisthea -

Children

1. Areobindus -

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=pkd&id=I5426Da83a

-- MERGED NOTE ------------

Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q1270265 | Geni: https://www.geni.com/people/6000000007151885324

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
